vocab.meaning: tầm nhìn không bị che khuất/gián đoạn
vocab.example: At the peak of the mountain, we were greeted by uninterrupted vistas of the alpine meadows stretching to the horizon.

vocab.meaning: phong cảnh xanh tươi, trù phú
vocab.example: The most striking sight I've encountered was the verdant landscapes of the Scottish Highlands after a spring rain.

vocab.meaning: làn nước trong vắt như pha lê
vocab.example: I was utterly mesmerized by the crystalline waters of the Maldives, which revealed a vibrant coral world beneath.
Driving along the dramatic cliffside of the Great Ocean Road offered some of the most awe-inspiring scenery I’ve ever witnessed.

vocab.meaning: đường bờ biển gồ ghề, hoang sơ
vocab.example: The rugged coastline of Northern Ireland, with its jagged rocks and crashing waves, is a sight of raw, natural power.

vocab.meaning: đường chân trời (thành phố) lung linh
vocab.example: Looking out from the Victoria Peak, the shimmering skyline of Hong Kong at night is an unforgettable urban spectacle.
The sheer majesty of the imposing mountain range in the Swiss Alps was enough to take my breath away.

vocab.meaning: ngôi làng nhỏ đẹp như tranh vẽ
vocab.example: Nestled in the valley was a picturesque hamlet with cobblestone streets and flower-adorned cottages.

vocab.meaning: ánh sáng huyền ảo, siêu thực
vocab.example: The sunset over the Sahara Desert cast an ethereal glow across the dunes, turning the sand into a sea of gold.

vocab.meaning: sự tĩnh lặng, bình yên không bị xâm phạm
vocab.example: The undisturbed serenity of the hidden lake in the forest felt like a secret corner of paradise.
